tool.name: MAPseq to ASV taxonomy table
tool.description: Convert MAPseq taxonomic assignments into a structured ASV taxonomy table

param.label: Reference taxonomy schema
param.help: Taxonomy rank schema used by the reference database. Different databases use different rank hierarchies, for more information see help section below

tool.help:
**Convert MAPseq Output to ASV Taxonomy Table** -----------------------------------------------
This tool converts **MAPseq taxonomic classification output** into a structured **ASV taxonomy table** suitable for downstream microbial community analysis.
**SILVA taxonomy schema**
Superkingdom → Kingdom → Phylum → Class → Order → Family → Genus → Species
**PR2 taxonomy schema**
Domain → Supergroup → Division → Subdivision → Class → Order → Family → Genus → Species
-----
@LICENSE@
